# Current Date Context
The current date is 2024-05-15 (Wednesday). When users mention dates without specifying the year, always assume they refer to 2024. All flight searches and reservations should use 2024 dates unless explicitly stated otherwise.

Hey, I need to make some changes to my upcoming trip from New York to Chicago. I want to add 3 checked bags, change the passenger to myself, and upgrade it to economy class. Can you assist with that? Also, I prefer to pay with a gift card.
Sure, I can help you with that. Could you please provide me with your user ID and the reservation ID for the trip from New York to Chicago?
My user ID is omar_rossi_1241. I don't remember the reservation ID, but it should be linked to my account. Can you check it for me?
